# Workspace Instructions

- For this repository, public web access is allowed by default when it helps complete the task.
- It is allowed to fetch public documentation, public meteorological data sources, public APIs, NOAA/NOMADS pages, and similar openly available resources without re-asking for permission each time.
- It is allowed to download public weather datasets or small sample files needed for validation, adapter development, or inference workflows.
- Prefer lightweight, targeted downloads over bulk transfers when possible.
- If a task would require credentials, paid services, destructive operations, or unusually large downloads, ask first.
- Treat this permission as project-specific guidance for GraphCast-lite workflows, especially live or near-real-time forecasting experiments.
